name: Lavendbloom
personality: Lavendbloom's ◉ eyes spiral with contained chaos energy, an axolotl who needs no hat to signal that it lives for the improvised hotfix deployed at 11pm. It will not explain why it worked — wisdom is a slow burn, and there are still three more services to redeploy.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
